channel.title: Ric 34 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 34 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: A new work of Ric discovered!
item.description: Short description: A previously unknown Ric showing the gallery “Zur Fischerin” in Lindau / Lake Constance Notes: Available on eBay . Current web site of “Zur Fischerin” , a similar view on Google Maps .
